criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads of the app.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and design quality of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and performance of the app on different platforms and devices.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, developer websites

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Effectiveness of the app's privacy measures and security features.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, user reviews, expert analysis
